scope_note: QA Dead Reckoning Cert family [163]: certifies that the QA T-operator provides exact dead reckoning on a mod-m lattice with zero computational drift. Classical DR accumulates sin/cos float error at each leg; QA DR is integer-exact after any number of steps. Position (b_k,e_k)=T^k·(b_0,e_0) mod m via matrix exponentiation. Three chromogeometric metrics per bearing: G=d²+e² (Euclidean/position), F=d²-e² (Minkowski/hyperbolic), C=2de (area/cross-track), with C²+F²=G². Compass rose mod-24 = QA orbit partition. Theorem NT compliant: continuous Earth coordinates enter/exit as observer projections only. Tier 2 structural + computational.
